title: Upon A Virgin Kissing A Rose.
content:
'Twas but a single rose,
    Till you on it did breathe;
    But since, methinks, it shows
    Not so much rose as wreath.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon A Virgin Kissing A Rose.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
